## What Does This Change?

<!-- A short description of the change and why it's needed. Link any related issue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes locally (typecheck, lint, unit tests)
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds locally
- [ ] `pnpm test:e2e` passes, if this touches navigation, forms, or layout behavior
- [ ] Any data adapter change (`src/lib/congress/**`) includes a fixture or unit test for the upstream shape it supports
- [ ] No secrets, raw API-key URLs, or user data are committed
- [ ] Preview/demo data is still clearly labeled and fictional
- [ ] No new or changed status label could be mistaken for an official legal determination

## Screenshots (if UI Changed)
